general.site_title: Habeeb Masood | Consultative Sales Professional & Management Consulting
general.meta_description: Habeeb Masood — Enterprise Sales Professional pursuing MSc Management Consultancy at UCD Smurfit. 6+ years driving multimillion-dollar ARR across Asia Pacific.

hero.tagline: From Enterprise Sales to Management Consulting
hero.name: Habeeb Masood
hero.title: Consultative Sales Professional | MSc Management Consultancy, UCD Smurfit
hero.bio: Over 6 years of closing multimillion-dollar SaaS deals across Asia Pacific taught me something unexpected — the part I loved most wasn't the close, it was the consulting. Diagnosing complex business problems, designing tailored solutions, and guiding enterprises through transformation. Now at UCD Smurfit, I'm turning that instinct into expertise.

about.heading: Turning Complex Sales Into
about.subtitle: A consultative approach to enterprise growth — built on real-world deal rooms, boardroom presentations, and cross-functional strategy.

experience.title: Solutions Consultant – Enterprise Sales
experience.description:
Led end-to-end SaaS sales cycles from GTM planning to closure across FMCG, building materials, agri-tech, and automotive sectors
Closed marquee enterprise accounts in the first quarter, driving multimillion-dollar ARR
Improved demo-to-deal conversion by 30% through ROI-driven proposals
Launched two new business verticals, generating new ARR streams across six industries
Consistently achieved 120%+ quota attainment
experience.tags: GTM Strategy, Solution Consulting, Enterprise Sales, SaaS, Revenue Growth

experience.title: Enterprise Business Manager
experience.description:
Drove end-to-end B2B enterprise sales, acquiring leading automotive, consumer goods, and IT clients
Ranked as Top National Performer for multiple quarters in the enterprise growth segment
Negotiated and closed high-value SaaS contracts for compliance automation products
experience.tags: B2B Sales, Compliance Automation, Top Performer, Contract Negotiation

experience.title: Corporate Account Manager
experience.description:
Managed B2B partnerships with top pharmaceutical and manufacturing enterprises
Delivered record client acquisitions through data-driven proposals
Conceptualised and launched a religious tourism package in Saudi Arabia, generating $100K+ revenue in a single quarter
experience.tags: B2B Partnerships, Revenue Growth, Market Expansion, Travel & Hospitality

experience.title: Senior Engineer – Sales & Marketing
experience.description:
Initiated outbound sales for Industry 4.0 automation solutions targeting manufacturing, defence, and space organisations
Generated $50K+ in new business revenue through customised automation projects

projects.name: New Market Verticals at O4S
projects.challenge: O4S had no presence in several high-potential industries and hadn't considered them as viable business avenues.
projects.approach: Identified whitespace opportunities, built tailored value propositions, and ran end-to-end sales cycles to break into untapped sectors.
projects.outcome: Successfully closed clients in entirely new industries, creating new ARR streams and expanding the company's addressable market across six verticals.
projects.tags: Market Expansion, GTM Strategy, Enterprise Sales

projects.name: Religious Tourism Package at OYO
projects.challenge: Corporate accommodation in Saudi Arabia was an untapped segment with high seasonal demand around religious pilgrimages.
projects.approach: Conceptualised a dedicated pilgrimage travel package, negotiated hotel partnerships, and built a go-to-market strategy targeting group travel organisers.
projects.outcome: Generated over $100K in revenue within a single quarter — from an idea that didn't exist before.

projects.name: Compliance Automation at Cleartax
projects.challenge: South Asia's largest enterprises needed a scalable solution for indirect taxation compliance (GST) across complex, multi-entity operations.
projects.approach: Led consultative sales cycles with C-suite stakeholders, demonstrating how Cleartax's platform could automate compliance workflows and reduce risk.
projects.outcome: Closed high-value contracts with leading companies across automotive, consumer goods, and IT sectors — contributing to successful new product launches.

testimonials.quote: I worked with Habeeb at O4S, where he owned key accounts and ran SaaS sales cycles end to end. What stood out was how well he understood the engineering side — and how effectively he used that in conversations. He quickly got to the real problem, broke it down into workable pieces, and aligned both clients and delivery teams around practical solutions.

Habeeb stands out as an exceptional sales professional who consistently exceeds expectations, delivering outstanding results. Demonstrating an innate ability to comprehend clients' needs, he effectively communicates how our products can address those needs. His strategic thinking and sharp market insight were instrumental in the success of the majority of the projects he closed.
testimonials.author_title: Director of Sales & Growth | Digital Transformation

testimonials.quote: Habeeb is smart, talented and hardworking. His approach to sales is solution oriented and he likes to go deep into requirements of his customers. Habeeb is very vocal and passionate about the needs of his customer and is quick to identify value that software solutions can bring to customer's business.
testimonials.author_title: Expert in AI, Data & Software Sales

testimonials.quote: Habeeb consistently demonstrated strong analytical skills, attention to detail and the ability to effectively communicate his ideas. He was a valuable asset to our team and consistently met or exceeded expectations on all projects. Habeeb is a quick learner and always willing to go the extra mile to ensure the success of the team.
testimonials.relationship: Worked with Habeeb on different teams

contact.heading: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Interested in consulting, enterprise sales, or collaboration? I'd love to hear from you. Let's discuss how we can create something impactful together.
